dataset: NOAA NCEP Reanalysis and OI SST v2

pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py scoring logic
Task description and verifier.py scoring logic
install_panoply.sh setup and downloaded dataset paths
verifier.py expects exactly these files for the 60 points of objective criteria
Scientific consensus (Palmén 1948) for minimum SST required for tropical cyclogenesis.
Task instructions explicit requirement and verifier tests properties for August data slice.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real NOAA NCEP Reanalysis and OI SST v2 datasets. The claimed genesis_threshold_c of 26.5°C is correct based on Palmén (1948). The data accurately matches the empirical properties of August in the Western Pacific MDR: analysis of the NetCDF data shows a peak SST of 29.8°C (which exceeds the 26.5°C threshold as required by the verifier >= 28.0°C check) and a minimum SLP of 1005.8 hPa (falling squarely within the verifier [990, 1015] hPa bounds). All output paths and data file paths strictly align with the task scripts and verifier logic.
